message:
refactor(websocket): remove unused TLS import from client module

The conditional TLS import block was dead code - the TlsConnector and
TlsStream types are not used anywhere in the WebSocket client
implementation. This removes:

- #[cfg(feature = "tls")] use crate::tls::{TlsConnector, TlsStream};

The TLS feature remains available for other modules that actually use
it. This change reduces compilation warnings and improves code clarity
by eliminating the misleading import that suggested TLS integration
at the WebSocket layer when it's handled elsewhere in the networking
stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
